title: YISSVIC Electric Fly Swatter 4000V Bug Zapper Racket Rechargeable Mosquito Insect Fly Killer Electric 3 Layers Mesh with Type-C Cable for Indoor Outdoor Black Blue
bullet_points: Efficient Mosquito Zapper Killer: With powerful 4000-volt grids and a built-in small LED illuminating light (not attractant light), YISSVIC electric mosquito swatter can zap mosquitoes easily and efficiently, even in low-light or dark conditions

Rechargeable Bug Zapper Racket - Save Budget on Battery Replacements: YISSVIC electric fly swat comes with a rechargeable battery that has a good battery life, and the battery indicator on this bug bat zapper can notify you when it's time to recharge

Safe and Lightweight Fly Swatter Electric Zapper: This fly racket zapper is equipped with 3-layer nets, including 2 protective nets for safety. The lightweight design of this fly bat helps comfortable hold and wave when zapping mosquitos
Convenient Charging: The tennis racket fly zapper can be charged via the included Type-C cable (Power Plug Not Included), you can plug the fly tennis racket zapper into any USB device to rechage

Easy-to-use Bug Swatter Indoor: Made with durable material and a sturdy frame, this usb fly zapper racket is suitable for both indoor and outdoor use such as home, picnics, gardening, camping, etc. With this electric fly swatter racket, hunting mosquitos becomes an experience
